records.m_Talk_ENG: So this Future-at-War matter you said was important...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...to obtain authorization to use <color=#ffd34c>Coffin Company Seized Asset No. 9</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha ha! Greetings...! I look forward to working with you all...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha ha! Greetings...! I look forward to working with you all...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Been so long since I moved, my whole frame creaks with every step...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Been so long since I moved, my whole frame creaks with every step...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Been so long since I moved, my whole frame creaks with every step...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You dragged a Senior all the way out here just to authorize a seized asset?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You dragged a Senior all the way out here just to authorize a seized asset?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You dragged a Senior all the way out here just to authorize a seized asset?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Don't make me laugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Don't make me laugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Don't make me laugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Parading that pile of scrap in front of me again makes your intent obvious enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Parading that pile of scrap in front of me again makes your intent obvious enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Parading that pile of scrap in front of me again makes your intent obvious enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you really after? First you pretended not to know me... and now this farce?

records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you really after? First you pretended not to know me... and now this farce?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, Ren959e Maalouf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, Ren959e Maalouf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, Ren959e Maalouf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After meeting you, I found myself wanting to know more about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After meeting you, I found myself wanting to know more about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After meeting you, I found myself wanting to know more about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I made some inquiries on my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I made some inquiries on my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I made some inquiries on my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I learned you were the youngest ever selected for the Future-at-War project...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I learned you were the youngest ever selected for the Future-at-War project...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I learned you were the youngest ever selected for the Future-at-War project...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That you once participated in the <color=#ffd34c>Titan Project</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That you once participated in the <color=#ffd34c>Titan Project</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That you once participated in the <color=#ffd34c>Titan Project</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that your team sought to revolutionize unmanned weapons capability...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that your team sought to revolutionize unmanned weapons capability...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that your team sought to revolutionize unmanned weapons capability...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...by proposing a <color=#ffd34c>prototype</color> to Dr. <color=#ffd34c>Chernov</color>, though it was ultimately rejected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...by proposing a <color=#ffd34c>prototype</color> to Dr. <color=#ffd34c>Chernov</color>, though it was ultimately rejected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...by proposing a <color=#ffd34c>prototype</color> to Dr. <color=#ffd34c>Chernov</color>, though it was ultimately rejected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The <color=#ffd34c>Jupiter Plan</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The <color=#ffd34c>Jupiter Plan</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The <color=#ffd34c>Jupiter Plan</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want me... to recreate a relic from twenty years ago now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want me... to recreate a relic from twenty years ago now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want me... to recreate a relic from twenty years ago now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is correct, Ren959e.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is correct, Ren959e.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is correct, Ren959e.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To safeguard this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To safeguard this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To safeguard this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What in the world are you thinking?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What in the world are you thinking?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What in the world are you thinking?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was naive back then, but now I understand why Dr. Chernov scrapped it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was naive back then, but now I understand why Dr. Chernov scrapped it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was naive back then, but now I understand why Dr. Chernov scrapped it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Jupiter Plan was nothing but idealism. It was an unworkable paper scheme.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Jupiter Plan was nothing but idealism. It was an unworkable paper scheme.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Jupiter Plan was nothing but idealism. It was an unworkable paper scheme.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, even the Titan Project itself was still uncertain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, even the Titan Project itself was still uncertain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, even the Titan Project itself was still uncertain.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So of course... Dr. Chernov
8g

So of course... Dr. Chernov
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. You're mistaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. You're mistaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. You're mistaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dr. Chernov never discarded the Jupiter Plan your team conceived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dr. Chernov never discarded the Jupiter Plan your team conceived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dr. Chernov never discarded the Jupiter Plan your team conceived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On the contrary, he preserved that history for the future that would one day arrive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On the contrary, he preserved that history for the future that would one day arrive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On the contrary, he preserved that history for the future that would one day arrive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In keeping with the founding ideals of Future-at-War...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In keeping with the founding ideals of Future-at-War...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In keeping with the founding ideals of Future-at-War...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And for the sake of a cherished pupil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And for the sake of a cherished pupil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And for the sake of a cherished pupil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't spout nonsense! I saw it with my own eyes as he tore up the Jupiter Plan research notes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't spout nonsense! I saw it with my own eyes as he tore up the Jupiter Plan research notes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't spout nonsense! I saw it with my own eyes as he tore up the Jupiter Plan research notes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Called here in a rush by our so-called tough guy... and what do I find?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Called here in a rush by our so-called tough guy... and what do I find?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Called here in a rush by our so-called tough guy... and what do I find?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Anastasia... Chernova...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anastasia... Chernova...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you'd joined Coffin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what on earth are you doing here...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: But what on earth are you doing here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ren959e, I told you before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ren959e, I told you before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ren959e, I told you before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am mobilizing every resource to prepare for what's coming.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I am mobilizing every resource to prepare for what's coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And did you not agree to assist me?

records.m_Talk_FRA: And did you not agree to assist me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time is not on our side.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Time is not on our side.
